'''jayubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encapsidation|encapsidation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encapsidation|encapsidation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jayubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæyibith|jæyibith]] || [[word:jæyibij|jæyibij]] || [[word:jæyibish|jæyibish]] || [[word:jæyibi|jæyibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jayuyubuth|jayuyubuth]] || [[word:jayuyubuj|jayuyubuj]] || [[word:jayuyubush|jayuyubush]] || [[word:jayuyubu|jayuyubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jayubuth|jayubuth]] || [[word:jayubuj|jayubuj]] || [[word:jayubush|jayubush]] || [[word:jayubu|jayubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jayufbuth|jayufbuth]] || [[word:jayufbuj|jayufbuj]] || [[word:jayufbush|jayufbush]] || [[word:jayufbuf|jayufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jayubuthu|jayubuthu]] || [[word:jayubuju|jayubuju]] || [[word:jayubushu|jayubushu]] || [[word:jayubuku|jayubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jayubuth|jayubuth]] || [[word:jayubuj|jayubuj]] || [[word:jayubush|jayubush]] || [[word:jayubu|jayubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jayubuthul|jayubuthul]] || [[word:jayubujul|jayubujul]] || [[word:jayubushul|jayubushul]] || [[word:jayubukul|jayubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jayubuthuthu|jayubuthuthu]] || [[word:jayubujuju|jayubujuju]] || [[word:jayubushushu|jayubushushu]] || [[word:jayubuku|jayubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jayubuthun|jayubuthun]] || [[word:jayubujun|jayubujun]] || [[word:jayubushun|jayubushun]] || [[word:jayubukun|jayubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jayubuthuoro|jayubuthuoro]] || [[word:jayubujuoro|jayubujuoro]] || [[word:jayubushuoro|jayubushuoro]] || [[word:jayubukuoro|jayubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
